overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a stormy coastline at night, crossing a wooden bridge, and continuing through grasslands and forest. The atmosphere is dark and moody with storm clouds covering the night sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the shoreline with waves lapping on the left

entered.detail: dark water with gentle waves reflecting the stormy sky
narrow beach path between water and grassy dunes
sloped grassy bank with patches of vegetation
leafless trees silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a stormy beach at night, with dark water to his left and grassy dunes to his right. The sky is covered in heavy storm clouds, and dead trees stand silhouetted in the distance.

events.description: transitioning from sandy beach onto wooden bridge structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden footbridge over the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks with log railings crossing the stream
rough wooden log railings on the left side of the bridge
rough wooden log railings on the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow wooden footbridge crossing a stream. Geralt walks across the weathered planks, with grassy banks visible beyond the bridge railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered trees

events.description: rider on white horse appears and passes by from the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path through open grassland

notable_agents.action: mounted rider on white horse approaching and passing by on the left

entered.detail: narrow dirt and gravel trail winding through the grass
tall green grass covering the open fields
tall green grass covering the open fields
white-barked trees scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along a dirt path through open grasslands under the stormy night sky. Around the 40-second mark, a rider on a white horse passes by from the opposite direction. The landscape features scattered birch trees and rolling grassy hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed forest trail with dense vegetation

events.description: entering denser wooded area with thick vegetation closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the forested path surrounded by dense foliage

entered.detail: thick bushes and shrubs lining the left side of the path
thick bushes and shrubs lining the right side of the path
overhead tree branches forming a partial canopy against the sky

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more enclosed forested area where dense vegetation and shrubs line both sides of the trail. The trees form a partial canopy overhead, creating a more intimate and shadowy environment as Geralt continues walking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks Geralt from a desolate, stormy coastline into the sheltered depths of a dense forest. It begins with him walking along a dark beach between churning waters and grassy dunes under a heavy, cloud-covered night sky. As he moves inland, the open shoreline gives way to a narrow wooden footbridge crossing a stream, leading him onto a dirt path that winds through rolling grasslands and scattered birch trees. The scene then opens further as a rider on a white horse passes by in the opposite direction before the path gradually narrows. Finally, the landscape shifts from open fields into an enclosed forested area, where dense vegetation and a canopy of trees create a shadowy, intimate environment.
